seo.title: Cancellation Policy
seo.description: ArdenNest - Holiday Home Ardennes|Our transparent cancellation policy. What happens when you cancel your booking at ArdenNest.

h1: Cancellation terms — fees and deadlines at ArdenNest
pageSubtitle: This cancellation policy is a summary of Article 17 of our rental terms. By booking, you agree to these conditions.
intro: At ArdenNest, we understand that plans can change. Below you will find the cancellation terms that apply to your booking, in accordance with Article 17 of our rental terms.

tiers.description: If you cancel up to 56 days before the scheduled arrival date, 30% of the total amount will be charged.
If you cancel between 55 and 30 days before arrival, 60% of the total amount will be charged.
If you cancel from 29 days before the scheduled arrival date, the full amount will be charged.

conditions: All cancellations must be submitted in writing via email.
The date of receipt of the cancellation is the cancellation date.
If the payment schedule is not followed, we may cancel the rental. The standard cancellation terms will then apply.
Early departure — for whatever reason — does not entitle you to a (partial) refund.
The security deposit (€750) will be refunded within 14 days after departure, provided there is no damage.
We recommend taking out cancellation insurance.
In case of no-show (not showing up), the full amount will be charged.

forceMajeure.title: Force Majeure
forceMajeure.content: In case of force majeure (such as natural disasters, pandemics, government measures or other unforeseen circumstances beyond our control), we cannot be held liable. We will seek an appropriate solution in consultation, such as an alternative date. Refunds are not guaranteed in case of force majeure, but we always strive for a fair solution.

contact.title: Questions?
contact.content: Do you have questions about our cancellation policy or would you like to cancel your booking? Please contact us:

signature: ArdenNest • Festina Lente • Welcoming guests in the Ardennes since 2003
